summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard recording with an energetic second set and a standout “Eyes of the World” performance
review: The recording is praised for its pristine, 24‑bit clarity – listeners describe it as crystal clear and top‑notch. Musically the show shines in the summer‑1990 second set, while the first set was noted as slower; the highlight is a powerful “Eyes of the World.” Overall the audio quality elevates an already solid performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong show (energetic second set, notable Eyes of the World) weighted at 70% and excellent soundboard quality weighted at 30% produce a combined rating around 4.2.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the audio crystal clear, top‑notch, and “awesome” – 24‑bit FLAC praised for its clarity; no specific issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as a bit slow due to heat, but the second set is highlighted as one of the best of summer 1990, delivering high energy and lasting impact.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Big smiling Jerry on video screens noted; his presence adds to the show’s vibe.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland visible onstage, contributing to the memorable second‑set energy.
